title: Akoya Rings in 2022 with Huntington National Bank, M&T Bank, and Truist
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #APIs--Akoya LLC wrapped up 2021 by signing agreements with Huntington National Bank, M&T Bank, and Truist in December. Fintechs and data aggregators will be able to access financial data from customers of these banks through Akoya. In total, Akoya now offers consumer-permissioned, API-based data access covering a large portion of the United States, including 57 percent of demand deposit accounts, a third of retail brokerage accounts, and a quarter of defined contribution

title: M&T Bank (MTB) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.38% and 3.34%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Should You Buy M&T Bank (MTB) Ahead of Earnings?

title: Key Factors to Affect M&T Bank (MTB) This Earnings Season

title: M&T Bank Expands Financial Access, Removes Language Barriers with 100 New Multicultural Banking Centers
text: BUFFALO, N.Y., Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) today announced it is expanding the services it provides to communities with high concentrations of ethnic and racial diversity by designating an additional 100 bank branches as multicultural centers.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For January 2022
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 39.18% over the past 14 months.

title: Eric Feldstein named M&T Bank Western New York Regional President
text: BUFFALO, N.Y., Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Eric Feldstein has been named M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) Regional President of Western New York – the company's headquarter market and where it was founded 165 years ago – in addition to his role as Head of Business Banking, beginning in March of 2022.
